candidate.description: Replicating only the deltas (changes) of a CRDT state rather than the entire state, reducing bandwidth while preserving convergence guarantees.

l2s.scope_1line: CRDTs replicated by merging full states via a join semilattice.
CRDTs replicated by broadcasting commutative operations.

l1s.scope_1line: Conflict-free replicated data types converging without coordination.
Maintaining multiple copies of data across nodes.
